title: CcdcSliceRecipe
description:
A SEPAL CCDC Slice recipe. Extract a temporal slice from a CCDC (Continuous Change Detection and Classification) model at a specific date — producing synthetic imagery from the harmonic coefficients of whichever segment is active on that date.

**Pipeline.** (1) Load the source CCDC recipe or asset (its model contains per-pixel break dates and segment coefficients). (2) For the requested `date.date`, select the segment containing that date per-pixel. (3) If no segment covers the date, apply `options.gapStrategy` (INTERPOLATE / EXTRAPOLATE / MASK). (4) Render synthetic band values from segment intercept + slope + harmonics.

date.description: Target date for the slice. Per-pixel, the recipe finds the CCDC segment containing this date.

source.title: CcdcSliceSource
source.description: The CCDC source — either a SEPAL CCDC recipe id or an Earth Engine asset id of a CCDC export.

harmonics.description: Number of harmonics to render. `0` produces only the linear (intercept + slope) component; up to `3` adds annual/biannual/triannual sinusoids. Default `3`.

gapStrategy.description: What to do at pixels where no segment covers `date.date`. `INTERPOLATE` (default) blends the closest before/after segments; `EXTRAPOLATE` projects from `extrapolateSegment` (out to `extrapolateMaxDays`); `MASK` leaves them unmasked.

extrapolateSegment.description: Which neighboring segment to extrapolate from when `gapStrategy='EXTRAPOLATE'`.

extrapolateMaxDays.description: Maximum number of days to extrapolate beyond the closest segment endpoint. Default `30`.

skipBreakInLastSegment.description: If true, suppress break detection in the last segment (avoids spurious breaks at the end of the time series).
